parsed.production_notes: The video combines an AI-generated avatar in the top half with a human actor in the bottom half. The AI avatar exhibits typical uncanny features like overly smooth skin, unnatural glowing lines on the face, and slightly stiff lip-syncing, while the human actor has natural lighting, movement, and camera quality.

characters.appearance: Young female with a fair complexion and shoulder-length brown hair. She has distinct, glowing blue lines tracing her cheeks and neck. Her facial features are symmetrical and slightly stylized.
characters.wardrobe: A metallic, shiny copper or gold-colored hoodie.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with a fair complexion and dark hair pulled back. She has natural facial features and a casual appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A plain, light blue short-sleeved t-shirt.

scenes.setting: Top: A stylized room with purple and blue neon lighting. Bottom: A plain white wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a medium close-up, looking directly at the camera. She is positioned in a room with soft, out-of-focus purple and blue neon lighting in the background, suggesting a modern or futuristic setting. Her expression is friendly and she appears to be speaking. The lighting on her face is even, highlighting the glowing blue lines on her skin.

Character B is framed in a medium close-up, looking directly at the camera. She is standing in front of a plain, unadorned white wall. The lighting is natural and even, typical of a well-lit indoor environment. She smiles frequently and moves her head slightly as she speaks, appearing relaxed and attentive.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with an AI avatar on top and a human learner on the bottom. They are engaged in a call-and-response language lesson. Large text overlays appear in the center of the screen, displaying the Hindi sentences spoken by the avatar in red and the English translations spoken by the human in black.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: तुम Red बोलो, मैं Black बोलती हूँ। चलो, शुरू करते हैं। [You say Red, I will say Black. Let's start.]
Character A says: मैं अभी नाश्ता कर रही हूँ। [I am having breakfast right now.]
Character B says: I am having breakfast right now.
Character A says: तुम कहाँ जा रही हो? [Where are you going?]
Character B says: Where are you going?
Character A says: मुझे थोड़ा पानी दे दो ना। [Please give me some water.]
Character B says: Please give me some water.
Character A says: आज बहुत गर्मी है। [It is very hot today.]
Character B says: It is very hot today.
Character A says: मैं तुम्हें बाद में फोन करता हूँ। [I will call you later.]
Character B says: I will call you later.
Character A says: मुझे यह समझ नहीं आया। [I did not understand this.]
Character B says: I did not understand this.
Character A says: क्या तुम मेरी मदद कर सकती हो? [Can you help me?]
Character B says: Can you help me?
Character A says: बढ़िया! अब आखिरी sentence, मुझे इंग्लिश बोलना सीखना है। [Great! Now the last sentence, I want to learn how to speak English.]
Character B says: I want to learn how to speak English.
scenes.on_screen_text:
तुम Red बोलो, मैं Black बोलती हूँ। चलो, शुरू करते हैं। (You say Red, I will say Black. Let's start.)
मैं अभी नाश्ता कर रही हूँ। (I am having breakfast right now.)
I am having breakfast right now.
तुम कहाँ जा रही हो? (Where are you going?)
Where are you going?
मुझे थोड़ा पानी दे दो ना। (Please give me some water.)
Please give me some water.
आज बहुत गर्मी है। (It is very hot today.)
It is very hot today.
मैं तुम्हें बाद में फोन करता हूँ। (I will call you later.)
I will call you later.
मुझे यह समझ नहीं आया। (I did not understand this.)
I did not understand this.
क्या तुम मेरी मदद कर सकती हो? (Can you help me?)
Can you help me?
बढ़िया! अब आखिरी sentence, मुझे इंग्लिश बोलना सीखना है। (Great! Now the last sentence, I want to learn how to speak English.)
I want to learn how to speak English.

scenes.setting: Top: A stylized room with purple and blue neon lighting. Bottom: A plain white wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A remains in a medium close-up, looking directly at the camera and speaking. The background features the same soft purple and blue neon lighting. Her expression is persuasive and engaging as she delivers a pitch.
Character B remains in a medium close-up against the plain white wall. She is no longer speaking but maintains eye contact with the camera, smiling and nodding slightly as if listening to the pitch.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues, but the focus shifts to the AI avatar delivering a promotional pitch. Various graphic overlays appear over the video, including an app store listing, a '7x Cheaper' badge, a premium subscription screen showing '₹1', a clock icon with '10-15 MINUTES', and an app installation prompt. The human learner listens attentively.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: एक करोड़ प्लस लोग पहले से ही MySivi ऐप पर मेरे जैसे AI के साथ बात करके रोज़ English practice कर रहे हैं। [Over one crore people are already practicing English daily by talking to an AI like me on the MySivi app.]
Character A says: नॉर्मल क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता। [7 times cheaper than normal classes.]
Character A says: इसीलिए ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में। [That's why the trial is just for ₹1.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट दीजिए और कुछ ही दिनों में आपका कॉन्फिडेंस साफ बढ़ता हुआ दिखेगा। [Just give 15 to 20 minutes daily and in a few days you will clearly see your confidence increasing.]
Character A says: अब रुकना क्यों? अभी साइन अप करें और आज से ही MySivi पर English बोलना शुरू करें। [Why wait now? Sign up now and start speaking English on MySivi from today itself.]
